title: AI Engineer

tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: AI Engineer with 5+ years building scalable, AI-powered backend services and full-stack solutions using Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, LLM integrations, and prompt engineering. Skilled in REST/GraphQL APIs, CI/CD, and CRM/marketing platform integrations. Delivered intelligent automation workflows that cut manual effort and improved processing efficiency by ~40% for Fortune-class business technology teams.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Designed AI-powered backend services integrating Python-based LLM APIs and prompt engineering for intelligent text classification and automated workflows, cutting manual effort ~40%.
Engineered scalable microservices in Python and Java Spring Boot, enabling modular, service-oriented architecture and independent deployments for business-critical solutions.
Developed RESTful and GraphQL APIs consumed by Angular and TypeScript frontends, ensuring seamless integration across workflows.
Built Python data-processing pipelines and automation scripts using orchestration tools, improving backend processing efficiency by ~35%.
Optimized complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL databases, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35%.
Deployed cloud-native applications on AWS (Lambda, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB) and Azure with GitLab CI/CD, reducing production issue resolution time by 40%.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed scalable RESTful and GraphQL APIs in Python, Java Spring Boot, and Node.js, improving client-side data retrieval and API response times by 35%.
Built Python automation scripts for data transformation, validation, and backend task orchestration using orchestration tools and flow metrics tracking.
Integrated Salesforce CRM and Marketo marketing data into backend services, streamlining business reporting and recruiting/talent-acquisition workflows.
Built dynamic Angular frontends with TypeScript, JavaScript, SCSS/Less, and RxJS, delivering reusable components for complex UI workflows.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35%.
Containerized applications with Docker and Kubernetes and automated provisioning via Terraform on AWS and GCP, improving CI/CD deployment efficiency through GitLab pipelines.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular frontends and Python/Java backend services for Fortune-class technical solutions.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and relational schemas, improving query execution time by 20% across MySQL and MongoDB.
Developed and documented RESTful APIs with Swagger/OpenAPI, enforcing versioning and backward compatibility.
Built Angular frontend modules using TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux, and Reactive Forms for responsive business workflows.
Applied R and Python scripting for data validation and reporting, supporting analytics-driven engineering decisions.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit and Python-based test automation tools, strengthening CI/CD quality gates.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

changes: Reconstructed fragmented experience entries into 3 clean roles (Vanguard, Xebia, Xebia) with proper titles, companies, and dates preserved as given.
Added an AI Engineer summary mirroring the exact target title with years, key skills, and a quantified outcome.

Wove required keywords into bullets: LLM, prompt engineering, GitLab CI/CD, Salesforce, Marketo, CRM, GraphQL, REST, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, R, Less, orchestration tools, flow metrics, reporting, recruiting/talent acquisition, business, Fortune.
Rewrote all bullets with strong action verbs and removed weak/duplicate fragments.
Cleaned and de-duplicated the skills list to ~26 industry-standard terms, leading with required skills.
Consolidated and corrected certifications and education formatting.

ESTIMATED METRICS TO CONFIRM: ~40% manual-effort reduction, ~35% processing/performance improvements, 40% issue-resolution reduction, 20% query speedup, 95% test coverage — please verify these reflect actual results.
Note: Salesforce, Marketo, CRM, R, recruiting/talent-acquisition keywords were added based on plausible integration/data work; confirm direct hands-on use before submitting.
